# however 仓库资料建议

## 建议仓库名称

`however-microservices-lab`

## 建议仓库描述

中文：

> 面向云原生微服务演进的多语言实战样例，聚焦配置解耦、可观测性、可替换 AI 推理后端与本地化部署流程。

英文：

> A cloud-native multi-language microservices playground focused on config decoupling, observability, pluggable AI backends, and local-first deployment workflows.

## 建议 GitHub Topics

`microservices`, `kubernetes`, `grpc`, `cloud-native`, `polyglot`, `redis`, `ollama`, `devops`, `skaffold`, `kustomize`

## 可选 gh 命令

```bash
gh repo edit \
  --description "A cloud-native multi-language microservices playground focused on config decoupling, observability, pluggable AI backends, and local-first deployment workflows." \
  --add-topic microservices \
  --add-topic kubernetes \
  --add-topic grpc \
  --add-topic cloud-native \
  --add-topic polyglot \
  --add-topic redis \
  --add-topic ollama \
  --add-topic devops \
  --add-topic skaffold \
  --add-topic kustomize
```
